item.title: Explore Our Blog Articles | Netwrix
item.description: Looking for the latest in security? Explore our blog for expert insights, actionable tips, and proven strategies to strengthen your data and identity security.

item.title: Essential PowerShell Commands: A Cheat Sheet for Beginners
item.description: PowerShell is a command-line shell and scripting language for automating Windows administration and managing systems across platforms. Beginners should master cmdlets like Get-Help, Get-ChildItem, Get-Process, Set-Location, New-Item, and Export-Csv. PowerShell supports object-based pipelines, aliases for efficiency, remote sessions, and execution policies for security. With practice, these commands form the foundation for automation, system management, and â¦ Continued

item.title: Download and Install PowerShell 7
item.description: PowerShell 7 is a cross-platform automation framework built on .NET Core, offering enhanced performance, parallel processing, and broad compatibility with Windows PowerShell modules. It runs on Windows, macOS, Linux, and containers, with flexible installation options such as package managers, MSI, ZIP, or Docker. Long-Term Support versions provide stability for enterprises, while preview builds enable early â¦ Continued

item.title: PowerShell Environment Variables
item.description: PowerShell environment variables store system and user configuration as key-value pairs accessible across processes and scripts. They can be listed with Get-ChildItem Env:, accessed with $Env:<Name>, modified with Set-Item or [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable(), and removed with Remove-Item. Variables exist at process, user, or machine scope, with changes persisting only if defined at user or machine level. Best â¦ Continued

item.title: How to Run PowerShell Script from Task Scheduler
item.description: Learn how to create a PowerShell scheduled task and run PowerShell scripts from Task Scheduler.

item.title: How to Install & Use Active Directory Users and Computers (ADUC)?
item.description: Learn how to install and use Active Directory Users and Computers (ADUC) to manage users, groups, OUs and AD objects in Windows with step-by-step guidance.

item.description: Get the Gartner PAM Magic Quadrant 2025 report and see why Netwrix is recognized for its leadership in privileged access management and zero standing privilege.
